audits.name: Revenue Recognition and ARR Quality Review
audits.description: Comprehensive review of ASC 606 compliance, revenue timing practices, and ARR calculation methodology with focus on Q1 catch-up performance and Ireland HSE contract

audits.name: NHS DSPT Compliance and Data Protection Assessment
audits.description: Annual assessment of NHS Digital Data Security and Protection Toolkit compliance and GDPR controls for patient data processing

audits.name: Product Development Capitalization and Technical Debt Review
audits.description: Review of HealthRoster 7.0 development cost capitalization, technical debt remediation spend, and impairment indicators

audits.name: ComplianceNow Acquisition Due Diligence Review
audits.description: Pre-close due diligence on ComplianceNow acquisition including purchase price allocation methodology and integration risk assessment

audits.name: Information Security Penetration Testing and Controls Assessment
audits.description: Annual security assessment including penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, and security control effectiveness evaluation

audits.name: Q4 Renewal Cohort and Customer Concentration Review
audits.description: Focused review of Q4 renewal cohort representing 28% of ARR, customer credit analysis, and concentration risk assessment

audits.name: FX Exposure and Treasury Controls Assessment
audits.description: Review of unhedged currency exposure from international expansion, cash management controls, and treasury policy compliance

audit_plans.name: 2025 Annual Audit Plan
audit_plans.description: Enterprise risk-based internal audit plan for FY2025 addressing key risk areas including revenue recognition, regulatory compliance, and M&A integration

audit_findings.title: Inadequate Pipeline Forecasting Controls for Public Sector Deals
audit_findings.criteria: Revenue forecasting should incorporate NHS budget cycle timing with documented probability adjustments
audit_findings.condition: Pipeline forecasting model does not adequately account for NHS procurement delays, resulting in $2.8M in qualified pipeline pushing between quarters without systematic probability adjustments
audit_findings.cause: Sales operations lacks integration with NHS budget cycle intelligence; opportunity stage definitions do not distinguish public sector procurement complexity
audit_findings.effect: Q1 revenue at 84% of target with material catch-up required in Q2; financial forecasting unreliable for board reporting
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement NHS-specific pipeline stage gates with procurement milestone tracking; adjust probability weightings based on budget cycle timing
audit_findings.management_response: Agreed. Implementing NHS procurement milestone tracking in Q2 with updated probability models by Q3

audit_findings.title: Ireland HSE Contract Revenue Recognition Methodology Documentation Gap
audit_findings.criteria: Multi-year contracts require documented revenue recognition methodology with clear performance obligation identification per ASC 606
audit_findings.condition: Ireland HSE $4.2M TCV contract lacks detailed documentation of performance obligation unbundling and recognition methodology across the three-year term
audit_findings.cause: Finance team capacity constraints during contract negotiation; template documentation not adapted for large multi-year public sector contracts
audit_findings.effect: Audit trail insufficient for external auditor review; potential for inconsistent revenue timing treatment
audit_findings.recommendation: Create detailed revenue recognition memo for HSE contract; establish template for large multi-year public sector agreements
audit_findings.management_response: Completed documentation. Template established for future large contracts

audit_findings.title: Premium Tier Upgrade Revenue Validation Controls
audit_findings.criteria: Premium tier upgrades should be validated against underlying customer usage metrics to ensure appropriate recognition timing
audit_findings.condition: Premium tier upgrades generating $2.9M incremental ARR lack systematic validation against actual feature utilization; recognition timing based on contract execution rather than feature activation
audit_findings.cause: Product telemetry not integrated with billing system; customer success team lacks visibility into feature adoption at point of upgrade
audit_findings.effect: Risk of recognizing revenue before performance obligation substantially satisfied; potential for customer disputes on upgrade value
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement usage-based validation checkpoint prior to upgrade revenue recognition; integrate product telemetry with finance systems
audit_findings.management_response: Product and finance teams collaborating on telemetry integration. Target Q3 implementation

audit_findings.title: Medical Device Regulation Applicability Assessment Incomplete
audit_findings.criteria: Workforce management systems with clinical workflow interfaces require documented MDR applicability assessment under UK medical device regulations
audit_findings.condition: Formal MDR applicability assessment not completed for clinical scheduling features interfacing with patient care workflows
audit_findings.cause: Regulatory team focus on DSPT compliance; MDR requirements not previously triggered by legacy product architecture
audit_findings.effect: Potential regulatory exposure if clinical workflow features deemed medical device software; gap in compliance documentation
audit_findings.recommendation: Engage regulatory counsel to complete MDR applicability assessment; document classification rationale
audit_findings.management_response: External counsel engaged. Assessment in progress with expected completion Q2

audit_findings.title: HealthRoster 7.0 Capitalization Policy Boundary Ambiguity
audit_findings.criteria: Software development capitalization must have clear criteria distinguishing research from development phases per IAS 38/ASC 350
audit_findings.condition: 18-month HealthRoster 7.0 development project lacks clear documentation of research-to-development transition point; $4.1M capitalized with ambiguous phase classification
audit_findings.cause: Extended development timeline blurred traditional phase boundaries; agile methodology creates continuous feature development complicating stage-gate determination
audit_findings.effect: Potential overstatement of capitalized development costs; risk of impairment if features abandoned or significantly modified
audit_findings.recommendation: Establish clear milestone-based capitalization gates aligned with agile sprint reviews; implement prospective cost tracking by feature
audit_findings.management_response: Working with external auditors on revised capitalization framework. Target Q3 implementation

audit_findings.title: Technical Debt Remediation Spend Classification
audit_findings.criteria: Technical debt remediation should be evaluated for capitalization eligibility based on enhancement versus maintenance criteria
audit_findings.condition: 38% engineering capacity allocated to technical debt lacks consistent classification between capitalizable enhancements and period expense maintenance
audit_findings.cause: Technical debt backlog contains mixed items without accounting classification; engineering project management system not integrated with finance
audit_findings.effect: Inconsistent expense/capitalize treatment; engineering productivity metrics unreliable for financial planning
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement technical debt categorization framework with accounting treatment guidance; integrate Jira with financial systems
audit_findings.management_response: Classification framework implemented. Jira-finance integration completed

audit_findings.title: ComplianceNow Integration Risk Assessment Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: Acquisition integration planning should include documented risk assessment with mitigation strategies prior to close
audit_findings.condition: ComplianceNow integration plan lacks comprehensive risk assessment covering technology integration, customer migration, and organizational change impacts
audit_findings.cause: M&A team lacks prior integration experience; deal timeline compressed risk assessment activities
audit_findings.effect: Potential integration delays and cost overruns; risk of customer attrition during transition; synergy realization uncertainty
audit_findings.recommendation: Complete detailed integration risk register with mitigation plans; establish integration governance structure with clear escalation paths
audit_findings.management_response: Integration management office established. Detailed risk assessment in development

audit_findings.title: Purchase Price Allocation Methodology Documentation
audit_findings.criteria: Purchase price allocation requires documented methodology for intangible asset identification and valuation per ASC 805
audit_findings.condition: Initial PPA framework lacks detailed methodology for customer relationship and technology intangible valuation; reliance on high-level external valuation without internal validation
audit_findings.cause: Limited internal M&A accounting expertise; external valuation scope narrowly defined
audit_findings.effect: Risk of PPA errors requiring subsequent adjustment; goodwill impairment testing complexity
audit_findings.recommendation: Engage transaction accounting specialists; develop internal PPA review procedures; document key assumptions and sensitivities
audit_findings.management_response: Big Four firm engaged for PPA support. Internal review process being documented

audit_findings.title: API Authentication Token Rotation Policy Enhancement
audit_findings.criteria: API authentication tokens should rotate at intervals aligned with industry best practices (90 days maximum for sensitive integrations)
audit_findings.condition: NHS integration API tokens configured for 180-day rotation; penetration testing identified extended exposure window for compromised credentials
audit_findings.cause: Original token rotation policy set during initial NHS integration; not revisited with security policy updates
audit_findings.effect: Extended credential exposure window if API token compromised; inconsistent with NHS Digital security recommendations
audit_findings.recommendation: Reduce API token rotation to 90 days for NHS integrations; implement automated rotation alerting
audit_findings.management_response: Token rotation reduced to 90 days. Automated rotation implemented

audit_findings.title: Q4 Renewal Cohort Concentration Monitoring
audit_findings.criteria: Renewal cohorts representing >20% of ARR should have enhanced monitoring and early warning triggers
audit_findings.condition: Q4 renewal cohort at 28% of ARR lacks differentiated monitoring; standard renewal playbook applied without concentration-specific escalation procedures
audit_findings.cause: Renewal cohort analysis not integrated into customer success operations; historical focus on NRR rather than concentration metrics
audit_findings.effect: Insufficient early warning for potential material churn event; board visibility gap on concentration risk
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement quarterly cohort concentration analysis; establish escalation triggers for cohorts >15% of ARR; add concentration metrics to board reporting
audit_findings.management_response: Cohort concentration dashboard in development. Targeting Q4 implementation

audit_findings.title: Enterprise Customer Credit Assessment Frequency
audit_findings.criteria: Enterprise customers representing >5% of ARR should have semi-annual credit assessments
audit_findings.condition: Enterprise customer credit assessments performed annually; no interim assessment triggered by macroeconomic changes or customer financial events
audit_findings.cause: Credit assessment process designed for mid-market customer base; enterprise segment growth outpaced policy updates
audit_findings.effect: Credit deterioration may not be identified timely; accounts receivable concentration risk not monitored adequately
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement semi-annual credit review for enterprise customers; establish event-driven credit assessment triggers
audit_findings.management_response: Updating credit policy to include semi-annual enterprise reviews and event triggers

risks.name: NHS Budget Cycle Revenue Volatility
risks.description: Quarterly revenue unpredictability due to NHS procurement delays and budget cycle dependencies, evidenced by Q1 performance at 84% of target with $2.8M qualified pipeline pushing between quarters

risks.name: Revenue Recognition Timing Manipulation Risk
risks.description: Risk of inappropriate revenue timing through deal acceleration or deferral to manage quarterly targets, heightened by Q1-Q2 catch-up performance pattern

risks.name: Q4 Renewal Cohort Concentration Churn Exposure
risks.description: Material churn risk from Q4 renewal cohort representing 28% of annual ARR creating single-quarter concentration vulnerability
risks.risk_tolerance: No single quarter renewal cohort >20% of ARR

risks.name: New Customer Acquisition Execution Volatility
risks.description: Significant execution volatility in new customer acquisition due to public sector procurement complexity and competitive pressure from well-funded Rotageek
risks.risk_tolerance: Quarterly new ARR within 85% of target

risks.name: Ireland HSE Customer Concentration
risks.description: Dangerous customer concentration risk from Ireland HSE contract at $4.2M TCV representing disproportionate revenue dependency on single public sector customer

risks.name: Technical Debt Engineering Productivity Constraint
risks.description: Product scalability constraints and reduced innovation capacity due to technical debt consuming 38% of engineering resources
risks.risk_tolerance: Technical debt allocation <30% of engineering capacity

risks.name: NHS Patient Data Security Breach
risks.description: Risk of unauthorized access to NHS patient data through HealthRoster system interfaces with clinical workflows, triggering GDPR breach notification and NHS contract termination
risks.risk_tolerance: Zero tolerance for patient data breach

risks.name: Medical Device Regulation Compliance Gap
risks.description: Potential regulatory exposure from workforce management systems interfacing with clinical workflows without completed MDR applicability assessment under UK medical device regulations

risks.name: Competitive Market Share Erosion
risks.description: Intensifying competitive pressure from well-funded Rotageek ($45M+ funding) forcing defensive pricing strategies and threatening market share gains (6.8% to 7.8%)
risks.risk_tolerance: Maintain market share within 0.5% of prior year

risks.name: ComplianceNow Acquisition Integration Failure
risks.description: Risk of acquisition value destruction through integration failures including technology consolidation delays, customer attrition, and synergy shortfall from ComplianceNow acquisition
risks.risk_tolerance: Integration milestones within 90 days of plan

risks.name: Acquisition Accounting Misstatement
risks.description: Risk of material misstatement in ComplianceNow purchase price allocation including intangible asset identification and goodwill calculation

risks.name: EBITDA Margin Underperformance
risks.description: Consistent EBITDA margin underperformance versus internal targets (11.0% vs 14% target in Q1) with operating expenses growing faster than revenue

risks.name: Currency Exposure from International Expansion
risks.description: Unhedged foreign currency exposure from international expansion creating earnings volatility and cash flow unpredictability

risks.name: GDPR Personal Data Processing Compliance
risks.description: Risk of GDPR non-compliance in personal data processing activities including employee scheduling data and NHS workforce information

risks.name: HealthRoster 7.0 Development Delay
risks.description: Risk of extended HealthRoster 7.0 development timeline beyond 18 months impacting competitive positioning and product roadmap commitments
risks.risk_tolerance: Major releases within 3 months of plan

risks.name: Key Person Dependency - Executive Team
risks.description: Operational continuity risk from key person dependencies in executive leadership and specialized technical roles
risks.risk_tolerance: Succession plans for all executive roles

risks.name: FCA Payment Processing Compliance
risks.description: Risk of non-compliance with FCA regulations regarding automated subscription billing and customer payment data handling

risks.name: Third Party Cloud Provider Dependency
risks.description: Operational risk from dependency on cloud infrastructure providers for HealthRoster service availability

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Quantitative analysis of Q1 pipeline movement and NHS budget cycle alignment
risk_assessments.notes: Q1 performance at 84% of target with $2.8M pipeline push. NHS procurement delays accelerating risk exposure.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Review of Q2 catch-up performance and pipeline forecasting improvements
risk_assessments.notes: Q2 catch-up performance materializing. New NHS budget cycle tracking implemented reducing forecast variance.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Quarterly pipeline review and forecast accuracy analysis
risk_assessments.notes: Forecast accuracy improving with NHS-specific pipeline stages. Residual risk stable but inherent risk unchanged due to structural NHS dependencies.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Year-end pipeline analysis and control effectiveness review
risk_assessments.notes: Controls maturing but NHS budget cycle dependency remains structural. Recommend continued monitoring.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Review of Q1 revenue recognition practices and deal timing patterns
risk_assessments.notes: Q1-Q2 catch-up pattern creates elevated risk of timing manipulation. Enhanced review procedures needed.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Substantive testing of Q2 revenue transactions and HSE contract review
risk_assessments.notes: HSE contract documentation completed. Enhanced deal review controls reducing residual risk.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Control testing and revenue cut-off analysis
risk_assessments.notes: Revenue recognition controls operating effectively. No timing anomalies identified in Q3.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Year-end revenue quality review and control assessment
risk_assessments.notes: Controls mature and effective. Premium tier upgrade validation remains area for continued improvement.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Cohort concentration analysis and renewal pipeline review
risk_assessments.notes: Q4 renewal cohort at 28% of ARR identified. Monitoring enhanced but structural concentration unchanged.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Customer health score review and renewal probability analysis
risk_assessments.notes: Q4 cohort health scores stable. Early engagement programs initiated but concentration risk persists.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Q4 cohort deep dive and competitive intelligence review
risk_assessments.notes: Competitive pressure on two major Q4 renewals identified. Impact increased due to elevated churn signals.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Pre-renewal status review and executive engagement assessment
risk_assessments.notes: Executive engagement securing at-risk renewals. One major account renewed early. Residual risk declining.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Pipeline conversion analysis and competitive win/loss review
risk_assessments.notes: Q1 acquisition at 84% of target. Rotageek competitive pressure intensifying with defensive pricing required.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Q2 acquisition review and competitive positioning assessment
risk_assessments.notes: Catch-up performance improving metrics. New competitive intelligence program providing earlier visibility.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Market share analysis and sales execution review
risk_assessments.notes: Market share gains holding at 7.8%. Sales execution improvements reducing volatility.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Year-end acquisition analysis and control effectiveness review
risk_assessments.notes: Acquisition volatility reduced through improved forecasting and competitive monitoring.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Contract analysis and customer concentration review

risk_assessments.assessment_method: HSE relationship health assessment and expansion planning review

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Quarterly concentration analysis and customer health review

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Year-end concentration review and credit assessment

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Engineering capacity analysis and technical debt inventory review

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Technical debt burn-down tracking and capacity utilization review
risk_assessments.notes: Technical debt allocation reduced to 34% through focused remediation sprints.

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Quarterly engineering metrics review

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Year-end technical debt and capitalization review

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Post-penetration test assessment and remediation validation

risk_assessments.assessment_method: Market share tracking and win/loss analysis

risk_mitigation_plans.name: NHS Budget Cycle Integration Program
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Implement NHS-specific pipeline stage gates with procurement milestone tracking and probability adjustments based on budget cycle timing

actions.action: Develop NHS procurement milestone tracking in CRM
Implement probability model adjustments for public sector
Establish NHS budget cycle early warning indicators

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Q4 Renewal Cohort Diversification
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Reduce Q4 renewal concentration through contract term restructuring and enhanced early engagement for at-risk accounts

actions.action: Develop early renewal incentive program for Q4 cohort
Executive engagement program for top 10 Q4 renewals

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Technical Debt Remediation Program
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Systematic reduction of technical debt through dedicated remediation sprints and improved classification framework

actions.action: Allocate 20% of sprint capacity to debt remediation
Integrate Jira with financial systems for tracking

risk_mitigation_plans.name: ComplianceNow Integration Risk Mitigation
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Comprehensive integration planning and risk management for ComplianceNow acquisition

controls.name: Revenue Recognition Review and Approval
controls.description: Monthly revenue recognition review with CFO approval for transactions exceeding £100K and all multi-year contracts
controls.test_procedure: Select sample of 25 transactions >£100K and verify CFO approval documentation and ASC 606 analysis memo
controls.evidence_required: Approval workflow records, ASC 606 analysis memos, supporting calculations

controls.name: Pipeline Forecast Accuracy Monitoring
controls.description: Weekly pipeline review with stage progression tracking and variance analysis against prior forecasts
controls.test_procedure: Review pipeline reports for 8 consecutive weeks and analyze forecast accuracy metrics
controls.evidence_required: Weekly pipeline reports, forecast variance analysis, CRM stage progression reports

controls.name: NHS Budget Cycle Milestone Tracking
controls.description: Tracking of NHS procurement milestones with automated alerts for budget cycle timing risks
controls.test_procedure: Review milestone tracking for all NHS opportunities >£250K and verify alert generation
controls.evidence_required: CRM milestone reports, alert logs, procurement timeline documentation

controls.name: Multi-Year Contract Revenue Recognition Documentation
controls.description: Standardized documentation template for multi-year public sector contracts including performance obligation identification
controls.test_procedure: Review documentation for all new multi-year contracts and verify template completeness
controls.evidence_required: Contract documentation package, performance obligation analysis, recognition schedule

controls.name: Premium Tier Upgrade Validation
controls.description: Validation of premium tier upgrades against customer usage metrics prior to revenue recognition
controls.test_procedure: Select sample of 15 premium tier upgrades and verify usage validation documentation
controls.evidence_required: Usage reports, upgrade approval documentation, feature activation records

controls.name: API Authentication and Token Management
controls.description: Automated API token rotation with 90-day maximum lifetime for NHS integrations and credential monitoring
controls.test_procedure: Review token rotation logs and verify no tokens exceed 90-day lifetime
controls.evidence_required: Token rotation logs, credential management reports, alert records

controls.name: Security Event Monitoring and Alerting
controls.description: 24/7 security event monitoring with automated alerting for suspicious access patterns to NHS data
controls.test_procedure: Review SIEM alerts for test period and verify response times for critical alerts
controls.evidence_required: SIEM logs, alert response records, incident tickets

controls.name: Personal Data Processing Register
controls.description: Maintained register of all personal data processing activities with lawful basis documentation per GDPR Article 30
controls.test_procedure: Review processing register for completeness and verify lawful basis for sample of 20 activities
controls.evidence_required: Article 30 register, lawful basis assessments, processing activity documentation

controls.name: Regulatory Change Monitoring
controls.description: Systematic monitoring of healthcare regulatory changes including MDR, NHS Digital standards, and FCA requirements
controls.test_procedure: Review regulatory monitoring reports for 6-month period and verify impact assessments completed
controls.evidence_required: Regulatory monitoring reports, impact assessments, action tracking logs

controls.name: Product Classification Assessment
controls.description: Assessment of new product features for MDR classification requirements with documented rationale
controls.test_procedure: Review classification assessments for new features released in test period
controls.evidence_required: Feature classification memos, MDR analysis, regulatory opinion documentation

controls.name: Software Development Capitalization Review
controls.description: Monthly review of software development costs for capitalization eligibility with clear milestone-based gates
controls.test_procedure: Review capitalization decisions for 6-month period and verify milestone gate documentation
controls.evidence_required: Capitalization analysis, sprint milestone reports, development cost allocation

controls.name: Capitalized Software Impairment Testing
controls.description: Quarterly assessment of capitalized software for impairment indicators including feature abandonment and market changes
controls.test_procedure: Review impairment assessment documentation for all capitalized projects
controls.evidence_required: Impairment analysis, feature status reports, market assessment

controls.name: Technical Debt Classification and Tracking
controls.description: Classification of technical debt items with accounting treatment determination and progress tracking
controls.test_procedure: Review technical debt backlog and verify classification completeness
controls.evidence_required: Jira backlog reports, classification tags, finance integration data

controls.name: M&A Due Diligence Framework
controls.description: Structured due diligence framework for acquisitions including risk assessment, integration planning, and accounting analysis
controls.test_procedure: Review due diligence documentation for ComplianceNow acquisition
controls.evidence_required: Due diligence reports, risk assessment, integration plan, PPA methodology

controls.name: Integration Governance and Risk Monitoring
controls.description: Integration management office with risk register maintenance and milestone tracking
controls.test_procedure: Review integration risk register and milestone tracking for ComplianceNow
controls.evidence_required: Integration risk register, milestone reports, governance meeting minutes

controls.name: Renewal Cohort Concentration Monitoring
controls.description: Quarterly analysis of renewal cohort concentration with escalation triggers for cohorts exceeding 15% of ARR
controls.test_procedure: Review cohort concentration reports and verify escalation procedures for high-concentration periods
controls.evidence_required: Cohort analysis reports, escalation records, executive engagement logs

controls.name: Customer Concentration Monitoring and Credit Review
controls.description: Monthly monitoring of customer concentration with annual credit assessments for customers >3% of ARR
controls.test_procedure: Review concentration reports and credit assessments for top 20 customers
controls.evidence_required: Concentration analysis, credit reports, risk assessment documentation

controls.name: Enterprise Customer Relationship Monitoring
controls.description: Enhanced monitoring and engagement protocols for enterprise customers representing significant ARR concentration
controls.test_procedure: Review engagement records for top 10 enterprise customers
controls.evidence_required: Account review documentation, health scores, executive engagement records

controls.name: Competitive Intelligence Monitoring
controls.description: Systematic monitoring of competitor activities including pricing, funding, and market positioning
controls.test_procedure: Review competitive intelligence reports and verify distribution to sales team
controls.evidence_required: CI reports, win/loss analysis, pricing intelligence

controls.name: Competitive Win/Loss Analysis
controls.description: Structured post-deal analysis of competitive wins and losses with root cause identification
controls.test_procedure: Review win/loss analysis for 20 competitive deals
controls.evidence_required: Win/loss reports, root cause analysis, action tracking

controls.name: Product Differentiation Roadmap
controls.description: Quarterly product roadmap review aligned to competitive differentiation strategy
controls.test_procedure: Review product roadmap alignment to competitive strategy documentation
controls.evidence_required: Product roadmap, competitive analysis, strategy alignment documentation

controls.name: Operating Expense Budget Control
controls.description: Monthly operating expense review with variance analysis and approval required for overspend >5%
controls.test_procedure: Review monthly expense variance reports and approval documentation
controls.evidence_required: Budget variance reports, approval workflows, action items

controls.name: EBITDA Margin Tracking and Forecasting
controls.description: Monthly EBITDA margin tracking with variance analysis and forecast updates
controls.test_procedure: Review EBITDA tracking reports and forecast accuracy analysis
controls.evidence_required: EBITDA reports, forecast variance analysis, board presentations

controls.name: Foreign Exchange Exposure Monitoring
controls.description: Monthly monitoring of FX exposure with impact analysis and hedging evaluation
controls.test_procedure: Review FX exposure reports and hedging evaluation documentation
controls.evidence_required: FX exposure analysis, hedging evaluation, board recommendations

controls.name: Data Subject Rights Management
controls.description: Process for managing data subject access requests, erasure requests, and other GDPR rights with SLA tracking
controls.test_procedure: Review DSR handling for test period and verify SLA compliance
controls.evidence_required: DSR log, response documentation, SLA tracking reports

controls.name: Product Development Milestone Review
controls.description: Monthly review of product development milestones with schedule variance analysis and risk assessment
controls.test_procedure: Review milestone tracking reports and variance analysis documentation
controls.evidence_required: Milestone reports, variance analysis, risk assessments

controls.name: Executive Succession Planning
controls.description: Annual succession planning review for executive roles with documented succession candidates and development plans
controls.test_procedure: Review succession planning documentation for all executive roles
controls.evidence_required: Succession plans, development plans, board presentations

controls.name: Key Technical Role Retention Program
controls.description: Identification and retention program for key technical roles including competitive compensation and development opportunities
controls.test_procedure: Review retention program metrics and turnover analysis for key roles
controls.evidence_required: Retention metrics, turnover reports, compensation analysis

controls.name: Payment Processing Compliance Monitoring
controls.description: Quarterly review of subscription billing and payment processing compliance with FCA requirements
controls.test_procedure: Review payment processing controls and FCA compliance documentation
controls.evidence_required: Compliance reports, control test results, regulatory correspondence

controls.name: Cloud Provider Performance Monitoring
controls.description: Continuous monitoring of cloud provider SLA performance with automated alerting for threshold breaches
controls.test_procedure: Review SLA performance reports and alert response records
controls.evidence_required: SLA reports, availability metrics, alert logs

controls.name: Disaster Recovery Testing
controls.description: Semi-annual DR testing with documented results and remediation of identified gaps
controls.test_procedure: Review DR test results and remediation action tracking
controls.evidence_required: DR test reports, recovery time metrics, remediation logs

control_assessments.test_evidence: Tested 25 transactions >£100K from Q2-Q3. All had CFO approval and complete ASC 606 analysis. No exceptions identified.
Reviewed 8 weeks of pipeline reports. NHS-specific tracking implemented but probability adjustments not consistently applied. Forecast accuracy improved but still below target.
Milestone tracking in place for 85% of NHS opportunities. Alerts generating but escalation procedures not fully documented.
Usage validation performed for 12 of 15 sampled upgrades. Product telemetry integration not yet complete.
All NHS API tokens rotating at 90-day intervals. No tokens exceeded threshold. Automated alerting functional.
Classification assessments completed for 3 of 5 new features. Process established but not yet fully embedded in product development workflow.
Monthly reviews occurring but milestone gates not clearly defined for all project phases. Classification improvement noted post-audit finding remediation.
Due diligence framework applied to ComplianceNow but risk assessment incomplete. PPA methodology gaps identified.
Cohort analysis performed but dashboard not yet operational. Q4 concentration identified but escalation triggers still being defined.
Monthly concentration monitoring in place. Credit assessments annual only; semi-annual process not yet implemented for enterprise customers.
FX monitoring in place with monthly reporting. Hedging evaluation completed but program not yet implemented. Exposure growing with international expansion.

control_deficiencies.description: NHS-specific probability adjustments not consistently applied in pipeline forecasting despite control design implementation
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Sales team training incomplete; CRM workflow not enforcing probability adjustment entry
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Complete sales team training; implement CRM validation for NHS opportunities requiring probability documentation

control_deficiencies.description: NHS milestone tracking escalation procedures not fully documented, limiting effectiveness of alert generation
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Control recently implemented; escalation paths not formalized
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Document escalation procedures and integrate with CRM alert system

control_deficiencies.description: Product telemetry not integrated with billing system, limiting systematic validation of premium tier upgrades
control_deficiencies.root_cause: System integration prioritized below product development; technical complexity of integration
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Complete product telemetry integration with finance systems for automated usage validation

control_deficiencies.description: Product classification assessments not completed for all new features with clinical workflow interfaces
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Process not yet embedded in product development lifecycle; awareness gap in product management
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Integrate classification checkpoint into product development workflow; train product managers

control_deficiencies.description: Milestone-based capitalization gates not clearly defined for agile development methodology
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Traditional capitalization framework not adapted for agile sprint-based development
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Develop agile-aligned capitalization framework with clear sprint-based milestones

control_deficiencies.description: M&A due diligence framework not fully applied for ComplianceNow acquisition risk assessment
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Limited M&A experience; compressed deal timeline
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Complete detailed integration risk register; engage external integration support

control_deficiencies.description: Renewal cohort concentration dashboard not operational; escalation triggers not yet defined
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Control recently designed; implementation in progress
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Complete dashboard development and define concentration escalation thresholds

control_deficiencies.description: Enterprise customer credit assessment frequency insufficient at annual intervals
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Credit policy designed for mid-market customer base; not updated for enterprise segment growth
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Update credit policy to require semi-annual assessments for enterprise customers

control_deficiencies.description: FX hedging program approved but not yet implemented, limiting risk mitigation effectiveness
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Hedging program complexity; treasury resource constraints
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement hedging program per board-approved parameters

objectives.description: Ensure accurate and timely revenue recognition in compliance with ASC 606 and UK GAAP

objectives.description: Achieve target EBITDA margins while maintaining revenue growth

objectives.name: Customer Retention and Growth

objectives.description: Deliver HealthRoster 7.0 on schedule while managing technical debt

standards_regulations.name: UK GDPR and Data Protection Act 2018
standards_regulations.description: UK implementation of GDPR governing personal data processing including NHS workforce and patient data

standards_regulations.name: NHS Data Security and Protection Toolkit (DSPT)
standards_regulations.description: NHS Digital mandatory security assessment for organizations processing NHS data

standards_regulations.name: UK Medical Device Regulations 2002 (as amended)
standards_regulations.description: UK regulations governing medical devices including software as a medical device
standards_regulations.issuing_body: Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency (MHRA)

standards_regulations.name: ASC 606 Revenue from Contracts with Customers
standards_regulations.description: FASB standard governing revenue recognition for subscription and SaaS businesses

standards_regulations.name: FCA Payment Services Regulations
standards_regulations.description: Financial Conduct Authority regulations governing payment processing and customer data

standards_regulations.name: ISO 27001:2022 Information Security Management
standards_regulations.description: International standard for information security management systems

requirements.name: Lawful Basis for Processing
requirements.description: Documented lawful basis for all personal data processing activities under GDPR Article 6
requirements.requirement_text: Processing shall be lawful only if and to the extent that at least one lawful basis applies

requirements.name: Data Subject Rights Response
requirements.description: Respond to data subject access requests within one month per GDPR Article 12
requirements.requirement_text: The controller shall provide information on action taken on a request without undue delay and in any event within one month

requirements.name: NHS DSPT Annual Attestation
requirements.description: Complete annual DSPT self-assessment to Standards Met level
requirements.requirement_text: All organizations that have access to NHS patient data and systems must complete the DSPT annually

requirements.name: Medical Device Software Classification
requirements.description: Assess software for medical device classification under UK MDR
requirements.requirement_text: Software intended for medical purposes must be classified according to MDR classification rules

requirements.name: Performance Obligation Identification
requirements.description: Identify distinct performance obligations in customer contracts for revenue recognition
requirements.requirement_text: At contract inception, an entity shall assess the goods or services promised and identify each promise to transfer to the customer as a performance obligation

requirements.name: Payment Data Security
requirements.description: Protect customer payment data in accordance with FCA requirements
requirements.requirement_text: Payment service providers must ensure the security of payment data and protect against fraud

Provide CFO approval documentation and complete revenue recognition memo for Ireland HSE contract
Provide weekly pipeline forecast reports for Q1 2025 with forecast accuracy variance analysis

assessment_methods.name: Revenue Transaction Substantive Testing
assessment_methods.description: Sample-based testing of revenue transactions for ASC 606 compliance including performance obligation identification and recognition timing
assessment_methods.sample_size_guidance: 25 transactions for populations >500; 15 for smaller populations
procedures: Select sample of transactions exceeding materiality threshold
Test revenue recognition timing against delivery milestones

assessment_methods.name: Control Operating Effectiveness Testing
assessment_methods.description: Walkthrough and reperformance testing of key controls to assess operating effectiveness
assessment_methods.sample_size_guidance: 25 instances for controls operating more frequently than monthly; 5 for monthly controls
procedures: Obtain control documentation and understand design
Reperform control or inspect evidence of performance
Document exceptions and assess root cause

assessment_methods.name: Cybersecurity Control Assessment
assessment_methods.description: Technical assessment of security controls including configuration review and vulnerability analysis
assessment_methods.sample_size_guidance: 100% of critical systems; sample of non-critical systems
procedures: Review security configuration against policy requirements
Review vulnerability scan results and remediation

assessment_methods.name: Regulatory Compliance Assessment
assessment_methods.description: Assessment of compliance with regulatory requirements including GDPR, DSPT, and MDR
assessment_methods.sample_size_guidance: Risk-based sampling focused on high-impact processing activities
procedures: Map regulatory requirements to control activities
Test compliance with specific requirement elements

assessment_methods.name: Process Walkthrough and Documentation Review
assessment_methods.description: End-to-end process walkthrough to understand control design and identify potential gaps
assessment_methods.sample_size_guidance: Single walkthrough per process with multiple transaction types
procedures: Identify control points and potential gaps

assessment_methods.name: Data Analytics and Trend Analysis
assessment_methods.description: Application of data analytics to identify anomalies, trends, and control exceptions
procedures: Extract and validate data from source systems
